role: End-to-end integration test suites for the ArchSpine CLI binary, covering commands like init, generate, validation, and pipeline execution.
responsibility: Provides isolated, automated tests that validate CLI behavior by executing the built binary in temporary Git repositories, simulating user prompts, and asserting correct output, exit codes, and file system side effects—ensuring command correctness and regression prevention across the entire CLI surface.

children.role: End-to-end test suite for CLI commands, using vitest and child_process to automate integration testing.
Vitest end-to-end test suite for the CLI 'init' command, verifying interactive prompt and filesystem behavior.
Vitest integration test for the ArchSpine CLI pipeline end-to-end flow.
Vitest end-to-end (E2E) test suite for the ArchSpine CLI commands
End-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine CLI, verifying correct behavior in a real temporary repository environment.
End-to-end (E2E) integration test for the ArchSpine CLI binary using Vitest, verifying CLI execution and rule violation detection in isolated git repositories.
Integration test suite for ArchSpine CLI commands using vitest, spawning the built CLI and mocking user prompts.
Vitest end-to-end test suite for the ArchSpine CLI commands.
